name.en: Number C104: Umbral Horror Masquerade Victory
name.ja: <ruby>Ｃ<rt>カオス</rt></ruby><ruby>Ｎｏ．<rt>ナンバーズ</rt></ruby>１０４ <ruby>仮面魔踏士<rt>マスカレード・マジシャン</rt></ruby>アンブラル・ヴィクトリー
name.ja_romaji: Kaosu Nanbāzu Hyakuyon Masukarēdo Majishan Anburaru Vikutorī

text.en:
4 Level 5 monsters
Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 card your opponent controls; destroy it. If this card battles an opponent's monster, during damage calculation: This card's ATK/DEF become that opponent's monster's ATK or DEF (whichever is higher) +100 during damage calculation only. If this card destroys a monster by battle: Send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY, and if you do, halve your opponent's LP.
